merged_prs.description: feat(stdlib): add functools module bindings (reduce, lruCache, cache)
test: add tests for sys, html and time stdlib modules
fix(math): correct type signatures for copysign, fmod and curried bindings
fix(math): fix factorial signature and add missing constants/functions

open_issues.description: CI caching manual steps (patch requires workflows permission)

notes: 10 unlabelled user issues blocked by integrity policy (cannot read). Issue #259 is the CI caching proposal (needs manual PR creation with workflows permission). Release PR #261 for 5.0.0-rc.5 is open. Future stdlib candidates: functools.partial (needs design), collections, datetime.
